app.brandHint: Click file = copy; Click folder = expand/collapse
app.emptyTreeHint: Select a folder to display the file tree
app.copyFolderTitle: Copy all text files in this folder

hero.pill: Low memory · Background scan · Virtual list · Folder batch copy
hero.heading: Copy code files like a VS Code file tree
hero.description: After selecting a project folder, the directory tree appears on the left. Clicking a file copies its relative path + content. Clicking the copy button on a folder copies all text files inside; oversized folders are blocked early to prevent clipboard or system freezes.

tips.heading: Performance Design
tips.tip1: Folder copy reuses the scanned file tree instead of re-scanning the disk.
tips.tip2: File count and total size are checked before copying; oversized folders are blocked immediately.
tips.tip3: Rust background threads handle file I/O and clipboard writes — the React UI never freezes.
tips.tip4: node_modules, .git, target, dist, build, and other heavy dirs are skipped by default.

status.scanningBg: Scanning file tree in background, UI remains responsive...
status.skippedHint: Skipped {{total}} hidden items or heavy directories; uncheck the options on the left and rescan to include them.
status.folderNoFiles: No copyable files in this folder.
status.folderTooManyFiles: This folder contains {{total}} files, exceeding the limit of {{max}}. Please select a smaller subfolder.
status.folderTooLarge: Total size is about {{size}}, exceeding the limit of {{max}}. Please select a smaller subfolder.
